name: Painted Ceramic Bud Vase Pink/White - Threshold™
description:
Add a soft, artistic touch to your decor with this Painted Ceramic Bud Vase from Threshold™. Designed in a round silhouette with a pink-and-white painted finish, this vase brings a fresh, modern feel to any tabletop or shelf. Plus, its watertight ceramic construction makes it perfect for displaying a single stem or a small floral arrangement.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
